query:
SELECT customerName, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND customerName IS NOT NULL AND customerName != ''
GROUP BY customerName
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 30;
